Genau! 100€/Jahr Ausgabe = 2.500€ mehr K: Exactly! €100/year expense = €2,500 more capital needed. Every expense costs 25×.
Genau! 20% sparen klingt viel – aber sel: Exactly! 20% saving sounds like a lot – but even 10% is a big step in the right direction.
Genau! Bei niedrigen Kursen kaufst du me: Exactly! At low prices you buy more shares – this lowers your average price.
Genau! Der EJZ ist die ehrliche Zahl. Im: Exactly! The effective annual rate is the honest number. Always compare the effective rate, never the nominal rate.
Genau! Der frühere Start gibt dem Zinses: Exactly! The earlier start gives compound interest more time to work – this even beats more capital paid in.
Genau! Die Rentenlücke zeigt, wie viel E: Exactly! The pension gap shows how much income is missing in old age – and why private provision is essential.
Genau! Die Zinsspanne zwischen Einlagen: Exactly! The interest rate spread between deposits and loans is the core business of every bank.
Genau! Durch die breite Diversifikation: Exactly! Through broad diversification into hundreds of companies, single company risk almost disappears – market risk remains but is calculable.
Genau! ETF-Depots sind flexibel, transpa: Exactly! ETF depots are flexible, transparent and inheritable – a clear advantage over tied insurance products.
Genau! Höherer Tilgungssatz = schneller: Exactly! Higher repayment rate = debt-free sooner = less interest overall.
Genau! Ohne Freistellungsauftrag zieht d: Exactly! Without a tax exemption order the bank automatically deducts taxes.
Genau! Umschuldung senkt die Zinsbelastu: Exactly! Debt restructuring lowers the interest burden – same amount, better terms.

Korrekt! \"n\" steht für die Anzahl der: Correct! "n" stands for the number of periods – usually years. The larger n, the more powerful the compound interest effect.
Korrekt! 1.000€ Kapitalerträge pro Jahr: Correct! €1,000 in capital gains per year are tax-free – but only with a tax exemption order!
Korrekt! 100€/Monat × 360 Monate = 36.00: Correct! €100/month × 360 months = €36,000 paid in, but through compound interest it grows to approx. €121,000.
Korrekt! Das Depot ist dein \"Konto\" fü: Correct! The depot is your "account" for securities – without a depot no investing.
Korrekt! Das Umlageverfahren bedeutet: D: Correct! The pay-as-you-go system means: today's contributors directly finance today's retirees.
Korrekt! Der Notar ist neutral – er prüf: Correct! The notary is neutral – they don't check whether the deal is good for you.
Korrekt! Die Grundzulage beträgt 175€ pr: Correct! The basic allowance is €175 per year – plus €300 per child (born from 2008).
Korrekt! Die reale Rendite = nominale Re: Correct! The real return = nominal return minus inflation. Only this shows whether you are truly getting richer.
Korrekt! Diversifikation verteilt das Ri: Correct! Diversification spreads risk. Individual stocks can crash – a broad portfolio recovers.
Korrekt! Du bist der Kreditgeber – der S: Correct! You are the lender – the state or company is your debtor.
Korrekt! Durch den Cost-Averaging-Effekt: Correct! Through the cost-averaging effect you automatically buy more shares at low prices – the average price is optimized.
Korrekt! Einfach, günstig, breit – ein M: Correct! Simple, cheap, broad – an MSCI World ETF beats the majority of active strategies.
Korrekt! Hoher Faktor = viel Kaufpreis i: Correct! High factor = high purchase price relative to rent. Renting is often cheaper then.
Korrekt! Jahresausgaben × 25 = FIRE-Zahl: Correct! Annual expenses × 25 = FIRE number. This is the inverse of the 4% withdrawal rule.
Korrekt! Jahreskaltmiete ÷ Kaufpreis × 1: Correct! Annual cold rent ÷ purchase price × 100. The first key figure for every investment property.
Korrekt! Kranken- und Pflegeversicherung: Correct! Health and long-term care insurance contributions are the most important special expenses item.
Korrekt! Nur bei voller monatlicher Rück: Correct! Only with full monthly repayment are no interest charges incurred.
Korrekt! Nur etwa 15% der aktiv verwalte: Correct! Only about 15% of actively managed funds beat the index in the long run – the rest perform worse despite costing much more.
Korrekt! Nur ~55% geben ab – dabei bekom: Correct! Only ~55% file – yet ~90% get money back. Almost always worth it.
Korrekt! Selbstständige haben keine gese: Correct! The self-employed have no statutory pension – the Rürup pension is their most important tax-saving model.
Korrekt! Steigende Inflation = sinkende: Correct! Rising inflation = falling purchasing power. Your money becomes less valuable.
Korrekt! TER steht für Total Expense Rat: Correct! TER stands for Total Expense Ratio – the annual cost ratio taken directly from the fund assets.

Richtig! 1–1,5% als Daumenregel. Bei ält: Correct! 1–1.5% as a rule of thumb. For older properties rather more.
Richtig! 6€ pro Tag, max. 1.260€/Jahr –: Correct! €6 per day, max. €1,260/year – without individual receipts.
Richtig! 72 ÷ 6 = 12 Jahre. Die 72er-Reg: Correct! 72 ÷ 6 = 12 years. The Rule of 72 is a quick and surprisingly accurate rule of thumb.
Correct! AfA = depreciation for wear. 2% of the building value p.a. tax-deductible.
Richtig! Auf private Immobilienkäufe fäl: Correct! No VAT is levied on private property purchases.
Richtig! BU am günstigsten wenn man jung: Correct! Disability insurance is cheapest when young and healthy – prices and exclusions rise after.
Richtig! Bei der Entgeltumwandlung wird: Correct! With salary conversion, gross salary is converted directly into retirement provision – tax and social contribution-efficient.
Richtig! Beim Zinseszins wachsen Zinsen: Correct! With compound interest, interest grows on interest – that's the crucial difference from simple interest.
Richtig! Bildungsschulden investieren in: Correct! Education debts invest in your future and can pay off through higher income.
Richtig! Das Gehalt fließt nicht in den: Correct! Salary doesn't flow into the credit score – only your payment behavior counts.
Richtig! Der Dispo ist praktisch, aber t: Correct! The overdraft is convenient but expensive. 10–15% interest p.a. adds up quickly.
Richtig! Der MSCI World umfasst Unterneh: Correct! The MSCI World covers companies from 23 developed countries – that's what makes it so broadly diversified.
Richtig! Der Notgroschen ist das Fundame: Correct! The emergency fund is the foundation. Without a safety net all investments are riskier.
Richtig! Die Avalanche-Methode spart mat: Correct! The avalanche method saves the most mathematically by focusing on high interest.
Richtig! Die Nebenkosten aus Eigenkapita: Correct! Paying ancillary costs from equity is the minimum – better 20–30% of the purchase price.
Richtig! Die Rürup-Rente ist ideal für S: Correct! The Rürup pension is ideal for the self-employed without statutory pension insurance and for high earners for tax optimization.
Richtig! ETFs bilden einen Index nach –: Correct! ETFs replicate an index – and thereby automatically invest in all included companies.
Richtig! Financial Independence, Retire: Correct! Financial Independence, Retire Early – financial independence, early retirement.
Richtig! Geld ist ein universelles Tausc: Correct! Money is a universal medium of exchange – everyone accepts it, regardless of what they need.
Richtig! Gesetzliche Rente, betriebliche: Correct! Statutory pension, company pension and private provision form the three pillars.
Richtig! Höhere Sparrate = mehr investie: Correct! Higher savings rate = more invested + lower expenses in retirement = much earlier FIRE.
Correct! Inflation eats silent money. Those who don't invest lose real purchasing power.
Richtig! Kursgewinne entstehen wenn der: Correct! Capital gains arise when the price rises, dividends are direct distributions.
Richtig! Mehr verdienen aber gleichzeiti: Correct! Earning more but also spending more – the classic FIRE killer.
Richtig! Ohne Steuerberater: 31. Juli de: Correct! Without a tax advisor: July 31st of the following year. Too late = late surcharge.
Richtig! Thesaurierende ETFs reinvestier: Correct! Accumulating ETFs automatically reinvest dividends – this maximizes the compound interest effect and reduces tax friction.
Richtig! Zuerst die teuerste Schuld zu t: Correct! Paying off the most expensive debt first saves the most interest – that's the "Avalanche Method".
